overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a subway ride through Night City. The player sits inside a moving metro train with other passengers, then exits at Alexander Street station and walks along the platform surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers.

agents.ego_description: sitting on the train bench observing other passengers while the train moves through the city

notable_agents.action: man in beige shirt sitting with arms crossed, looking forward
man in white jacket and green pants sitting and looking around

entered.detail: illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements above the seats
brown leather bench seats along the left wall of the train car
orange metal support pole for standing passengers
closed train doors with glass windows showing passing blue lights outside
large windows showing blurred blue lights of the tunnel passing by

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a moving subway train with a cyberpunk aesthetic. Passengers sit on brown leather benches under warm orange lighting while digital advertisements display overhead. The train moves through a tunnel, visible through the windows as passing blue lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: train exit doorway transitioning to station platform

events.description: player stands up from the bench and begins moving toward the train door
train doors open revealing the station platform and cityscape outside

agents.ego_description: standing up and walking toward the exit, preparing to leave the train

entered.detail: illuminated yellow neon sign reading 'ALEXANDER STREET' on the station wall
concrete platform with yellow safety lines
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows visible through the open door

segments.scene_description: The player stands up and moves toward the train exit. The doors open to reveal the Alexander Street station platform and the neon-lit Night City skyline beyond. The transition moves from the enclosed train interior to the semi-open station environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated subway station platform with city views

events.description: fully exits the train and steps onto the station platform, revealing the NCART station signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the platform, passing the transit map and looking out at the cityscape

notable_agents.action: person standing near the transit map, examining the station routes

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'Night City Area Rapid Transit' in yellow neon letters
large digital screen showing the subway route map with colored lines
wooden bench on the platform for waiting passengers
tall digital billboard displaying a woman's face with blue hair

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the Alexander Street platform, passing under the large NCART station sign and transit map. The platform overlooks the sprawling Night City skyline with towering skyscrapers and bright neon billboards illuminating the night. The scene captures the cyberpunk atmosphere of the elevated train station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from the enclosed interior of a moving subway train to the expansive, neon-lit heights of an elevated city station. It begins inside the carriage, where passengers sit on brown leather benches under warm orange lighting while blue lights streak past the windows. As the train comes to a halt, the camera moves toward the exit and the doors slide open, shifting the environment from the warm cabin to the semi-open atmosphere of the Alexander Street station. The scene then expands as the player walks along the platform, passing under a large NCART sign and transit map. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal the sprawling Night City skyline, dominated by towering skyscrapers and brilliant neon billboards illuminating the night.
